_meta.description: EN bundle — DEFAULT locale post 2026-05-28 paradigm flip (Daniel CEO directive). Clean fitness English: Workout / Reps / Sets / Body fat (industry-standard vocabulary, cf. Fitbod / Strong / Hevy). All values are user-facing — keep terse and Maria-65-readable (no jargon). Wave C2 (i18n EN-zero-leak): adds antrenor.* / workout.* / preview.* / energy.* / postRpe.* / postSummary.* / progres.* / istoric.* / coach.* / settings.* sub-trees so every screen surfaces clean EN with zero Romanian leak. RO counterpart in ro.json — must mirror this structure verbatim (bundle integrity test enforces parity).

why.title: ❓ Why {exercise}?
why.unavailable: The explanation is temporarily unavailable. The recommendation is still valid.

categorical.progression_up: We're increasing the weight on {exercise} because you've been progressing steadily over the past weeks. The new target is set so we keep the momentum without compromising your form.
categorical.progression_down: We're easing the weight on {exercise} to prioritize technique. Sometimes a small step back is what unlocks the next jump in strength. We're holding the line.
categorical.hold: We're holding the weight on {exercise} today. You're in a great consolidation zone — that makes sure the base is solid before the next bump.
categorical.recovery: We're trimming volume on {exercise} because fatigue signals are present. It's smarter to recover today so you come back fresh next session.

antrenor.subtitle: Your guide in the gym.
antrenor.errorBanner: Couldn't load coach recommendations. You can start the session anyway.

coachToday.recoveredQuote: {group} has recovered since {when} — let's nail it.
coachToday.fallbackQuote: Today is your day. Show up — your future self will thank you.

coachRest.title: Active recovery day
coachRest.body: Recovery is when you grow. Walk, stretch, hydrate.
coachRest.genericLine: Today is a recovery day — your body needs the rest.

empty.title: Today is a rest day
empty.body: No workout scheduled today. Use the calendar above if you want to change the plan.

swap.exhaustedPool: You've tried everything I can offer for {group}. You can skip this exercise or change the muscle group from the menu above.
swap.noAlternative: I don't have a good alternative for {name}. You can skip this exercise.
swap.missingNoAlt: Saved. I don't have an alternative for {name}. You can skip this exercise.

exit.title: Leave the session?
exit.subtitle: Pick how you want to handle the progress so far.

preview.title: Your workout
preview.engineError: Couldn't build the workout plan. Please try again in a moment.

intensityBanner.plus: Coach is bumping intensity +15%. Heavier by one dumbbell, 1 rep extra.
intensityBanner.minus: Coach is trimming intensity -20%. Lighter today, focus on form.
intensityBanner.normal: Normal session - baseline. Coach adjusts during the session if anything comes up.

preview.errorBanner: Couldn't load today's session. Showing you a demo session.
preview.closingNote: The coach adjusts during the session if anything comes up: pain, fatigue, hard set. You don't need to know everything up front.

aparatLipsaSheet.title: Missing equipment
aparatLipsaSheet.subtitle: Check the equipment you don't have. The coach avoids those exercises and removes them from the list in Account.

energyCheck.title: How do you feel today?
energyCheck.subtitle: The coach adjusts intensity based on your energy.

levels.tiredHint: Coach cuts the session right away

energyCheck.lowFollowupSubtitle: Pick one — helps me adapt today.

postRpe.title: How was the session overall?
postRpe.subtitle: One tap — calibrates the next workout.
postRpe.heading: How was your session?
postRpe.intro: Your answer calibrates tomorrow's session. Just one question.
postRpe.footer: Your answer is the only input we can't infer on our own. Thank you.

ratings.easyDescription: I had more in the tank

postRpe.noSetsToast: The session has no sets logged. It wasn't saved to History.

progres.heading: Progress
progres.subtitle: Body composition · calibrated estimates.
progres.noData: Log your weight to see progress.

bodyFat.label: Body fat
bodyFat.nudge: Add waist + neck in Profile for a precise estimate (US Navy).
bodyFat.emptyHint: The estimate appears once you fill in profile data.

bmr.label: BMR
bmr.subtitle: At-rest energy
bmr.emptyHint: Add height in Profile to see BMR.

fatigue.emptyHint: Not enough sessions yet. The estimate appears after 2+ sessions.

tdee.label: Daily energy
tdee.subtitle: Maintenance
tdee.explainer: The engine calculates automatically. Log optionally to calibrate.

projection.label: Projection
projection.noTarget: Set a goal to see the projection.

weight.snapshotEmpty: No entries yet. The snapshot appears here after your first weigh-in.
weight.snapshotHint: For deep analysis → see History › Weight and BF

logWeight.title: Log weight
logWeight.helper: The entry is saved on your device. You'll see the trend in Weight and BF.

bodyData.title: Body measurements
bodyData.rangeError: Unrealistic value — check the unit (cm). Range {min}-{max} cm.

weightTimeline.title: Weight
weightTimeline.kpiEmpty: No logs in this range yet.
weightTimeline.chartEmpty: No logs yet. The trend appears here after you record weights.

weightLogList.title: Weight logs
weightLogList.intro: All weight entries from your history.
weightLogList.emptyTitle: Your first weigh-in unlocks the trend
weightLogList.emptyBody: Log from the Progress screen and watch the slope plus updated ETA instantly.

bmrStrip.label: Base calories
bmrStrip.emptyHint: Your profile isn't complete yet. The estimate appears once you fill in the data.

projectionStrip.label: Projection
projectionStrip.emptyHint: Log a few days of meals so I can project where you're headed.
projectionStrip.maintain: If you keep this up, you'll stay around {kg} kg.
projectionStrip.projectedLine: If you keep this up, in {weeks} you'll reach
projectionStrip.disclaimer: Estimate at the current pace, not a promise.

nutritionInline.helperTop: Auto target from the engine. Tap pencil if you want to log manually.
nutritionInline.helperBottom: Auto target engine + manual log optional. The engine calibrates from real data.

obiectiv.heading: Goal
obiectiv.subhealthyWarning: This goal is below a healthy weight (~{minKg} kg minimum at your height). Pick a healthy target.
obiectiv.unsafeRateWarning: Unrealistic goal — would need {rate} kg/week ({direction}), safe maximum ~{cap} kg/week. Realistic deadline: {safeDate}.

prWall.title: Recent PRs
prWall.empty: No personal records yet — log a few sessions.

landing.emptyBody: Finish a workout and it'll show up here with all the details.

detail.title: Session detail
detail.legacyFallback: Per-exercise detail unavailable for sessions logged before this update.

prWallScreen.title: Personal Records
prWallScreen.description: Reverse-chrono. All personal records you've logged.
prWallScreen.emptyTitle: Your first PR is one session away
prWallScreen.emptyBody: Beat a max and the record shows up here with date + weight.

ratingsStrip.heading: How your sessions felt
ratingsStrip.ariaLabel: How your sessions felt over the last 90 days
ratingsStrip.footerLead: The coach uses your ratings to adjust intensity.

alerts.title: Heads up
alerts.muscleOveruse: {group} is logging high volume — consider a lighter day.
alerts.stalling: Progress on {exercise} has stalled — let's mix it up.
alerts.lowAdherence: You've missed a few sessions — let's get back on track.

reactivate.title: Welcome back
reactivate.body: It's been a while. Want to start with a light session?

resumeSession.title: Resume your session

day7.title: Training schedule
day7.editHint: Toggle the days you can train this week.

exitConfirm.title: Leave the session?
exitConfirm.body: What do you want to do with the progress so far?

exitSheet.title: Leave the session?
exitSheet.progressLine: You've done {done}/{total} exercises. How do you want to continue?

reasons.weight_spike: The weight jumped a lot vs your recent sets.
reasons.rate_spike: You're loading faster than your usual pace.

painButton.heading: Where does it hurt?
painButton.subtitle: Coach avoids exercises that aggravate the area.
painButton.medicalCue: If none fits, stop the session and consult a doctor.
painButton.reassureToast: Safety comes first. We've adjusted the rest of the session.

perSetSafety.title: Hold up
perSetSafety.body: You picked up the pace beyond usual. Check your form and recover before the next set.

inactivity.title: Still there?
inactivity.body: We haven't seen activity for a while. Want to continue or save and exit?

aparatLipsa.title: What's missing today?
aparatLipsa.subtitle: Tap what's not available — I'll adapt.

units.heading: Units
units.note: Kilograms only for now. Pounds will be available post-Beta.

profile.title: Profile and targets
profile.name: Name
profile.bodyCompFooter: Calculated automatically (US Navy: waist + neck + height + sex) or set by you. Falls back to a demographic estimate when measurements are missing.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Pick when Andura should ping you.
notifications.remindersBody: Daily nudge based on your training plan.
notifications.prBody: Get notified when you hit a new personal record.
notifications.intro: Pick the nudges you want. Nothing intrusive.
notifications.permissionDenied: Your browser is blocking notifications. Open the site settings (the padlock next to the URL) and allow them.
notifications.permissionNoAccount: Notifications need an account so the coach can send reminders. Sign in to enable them.
notifications.permissionUnsupported: Your browser doesn't support push notifications.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.dataBody: Your training data lives on your device. We sync only what you choose to back up.
privacy.thirdPartyBody: We use Firebase for auth and storage. No ads, no analytics tracking.
privacy.headerSubtitle: Your data stays on your phone. You decide what leaves.
privacy.exportToggleDesc: I can download my data anytime from the Download data screen.
privacy.telemetryToggleDesc: Automatically send crash reports so we can fix issues. Off by default.
privacy.footerNote: We use Sentry only for crash reports, and only if you opt in. Personal data (email, identifiers) is stripped before sending. We don't collect usage metrics. You can revoke anytime.

policy.title: Privacy policy
collectItems: Onboarding profile: age, sex, goal, frequency, experience, weight (Big 6)
Training sessions: exercises, sets, kg, reps, duration, RPE
Optional biometric inputs: body weight, measurements (waist, arms, legs)
Email for the Magic Link (optional passwordless sign-in)
useItems: Personalizing workouts (volume, intensity, frequency based on Big 6)
Recommendation engine (readiness, fatigue, PR detection - on your phone)
Optional Firebase RTDB backup (encrypted in transit over HTTPS) only if you're signed in
ZERO ads, ZERO data sales, ZERO third-party trackers
rightsItems: Access + portability: export all your data as JSON from Account > Download data
Erasure: clear everything from Account > Logout and delete > Delete account
Rectification: edit your profile directly in Account > Profile
Objection: crash reporting toggle above (off by default)
Restricted processing: disable the Firebase backup (sign out)
policy.storageBody: Data is stored locally on your device (localStorage + IndexedDB). The optional Firebase RTDB backup keeps a copy until you delete the account. ZERO copies on third-party servers. Device deletion is immediate. Firebase RTDB data (if you're signed in) is wiped automatically on "Delete account" (best-effort GDPR Art. 17, server propagation <5 min). Problems with remote deletion? Write to {email} (reply <72h).
policy.sensitiveBody: Andura is a fitness app, NOT a medical device. Body weight, measurements, or pain reported via the Pain Button are strictly sporting data, NOT medical. We don't collect diagnoses, treatments, prescriptions, or other GDPR Art. 9 special categories. If you have medical conditions, see your doctor first (see Medical disclaimer in Terms of service).
policy.subprocessorsBody: To run the service we use two sub-processors: Google Firebase (auth + RTDB backup, EU europe-west1 region) and Sentry (app error reporting, opt-in, with personal data stripped). ZERO third-party analytics, ZERO advertising, ZERO data brokers.
policy.contactBody: For GDPR questions or complaints: {email}. You also have the right to file a complaint with your national data protection authority.
policy.version: Beta version - updated 2026-05-22. Data controller: Andura PWA, solo developer Daniel. Data stored in the EU (Firebase europe-west1).

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: By using Andura, you agree to these terms.
terms.medicalBody: Andura is not a substitute for medical advice. Consult a doctor before starting a new training program.
terms.tcIntro: Andura is a local-first personal training coach. All data is stored on your phone and can be exported or deleted anytime from the Account screen.
terms.tcAcceptIntro: By using Andura you agree to these key points:
tcItems: Andura offers recommendations, NOT medical prescriptions.
You're responsible for your own safety in the gym.
The Firebase backup is optional (Magic Link sign-in) and encrypts data in transit (HTTPS).
Crash reporting is opt-in (off by default), with personal data stripped before sending.
Andura is in free Beta. Features may change or be added without notice until V1 launch.
terms.tcVersion: Beta version - updated 2026-05-18. Full text available online at
terms.medicalIntro: Andura is a fitness app, NOT a medical device or a substitute for advice from a doctor, physiotherapist, or professional coach.
terms.medicalConsultIntro: See a doctor before starting any new training program, especially if you:
medicalItems: Have a medical condition (cardiac, respiratory, musculoskeletal).
Have persistent pain or recent injuries.
Take medication that affects physical effort.
terms.medicalListenBody: In the gym, listen to your body. If you feel sharp pain, dizziness, or breathing problems - stop the session and ask for help.
terms.medicalAccepted: Accepted at onboarding. You can read this text anytime.

export.title: Download your data
export.body: Get a JSON file with everything you've logged.
export.intro: Take all your Andura data in a single JSON file you can store locally or move to another device. Includes profile + workouts + nutrition + settings + calendar.
contentItems: Profile and Big 6 (age, sex, goal, frequency, experience, weight)

import.title: Import history
import.body: Upload a JSON file with weight + nutrition entries to backfill.
import.intro: Already have a weight and calorie history from another app? You can import it from a CSV file. The coach uses the history to calibrate your calorie target much faster.
whatItems: You can select both CSV files at once
import.noDataError: Couldn't find any data to import in the file. Check that it's a CSV export with a Date column plus calories or weight.
import.doneMessage: Done. Imported {weightN} weight days and {nutritionN} nutrition days. The coach is already using the data for calibration.

themes.title: Themes
themes.subtitle: Pick your favorite palette. Applied instantly.
themes.footer: Palettes switch instantly. Brain Coach is the default.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.freeBetaBody: Andura is free for all Beta users. Pricing will be announced post-launch.
subscription.comingSoonBody: We're working on clear subscription plans. Until then, everything is free for Beta users.
subscription.notifiedCta: We'll let you know when it's ready

support.title: Support
support.body: Need help? Reach us at support@andura.app.
support.intro: We reply to messages within 24 working hours. Small but attentive team.
support.messageHint: Bug, idea, feedback - write freely. It comes straight to us.

about.title: About Andura
about.body: Andura is a Romanian-built fitness coach. Solo bootstrap, plan x20, two-to-three-year horizon.
about.tagline: Train with intention. Built in Romania.
about.intro: Andura helps you train with intent - not more, but better. The coach learns from your feedback and adapts every session.
about.thanks: With thanks to all the beta testers who helped polish the app.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.header: Short answers to the questions we get most often.
faq.footerHint: Can't find an answer? Write to us from

items.trainingChangeProgram: How do I change my program?
items.trainingChangeProgramA: Go to Coach > tap the pencil on the Week card > pick training and rest days > Save. The coach recalibrates automatically.
items.trainingSkipSessionA: Yes. Tap the X during the session > Skip session. The coach doesn't penalize you and adjusts weekly recommendations based on your real adherence.
items.trainingProgressA: The coach uses logged sets (kg + reps + RPE) + body weight + readiness score. Pattern recognition runs on your phone, no mandatory cloud upload.
items.accountPassword: How do I recover my password?
items.accountPasswordA: Andura uses Magic Link (no password). On the Sign-in screen enter your email > you'll get a unique link in your inbox > tap it on the same phone.
items.accountMultiPhone: Can I use it on multiple phones?
items.accountMultiPhoneA: Yes, if you're signed in with an account (Magic Link or Google). Automatic backup in Firebase europe-west1 (EU). Test-drive mode (no account) stays Tier 0 local on the current phone.
items.accountDataLocationA: Local-first on your phone (localStorage Tier 0 + IndexedDB Tier 1). Optional Firebase RTDB backup, encrypted in transit. We don't collect usage metrics; crash reporting is opt-in with personal data stripped.
items.notificationsMissing: Why am I not getting notifications?
items.notificationsMissingA: Check Account > Notifications > toggle on + days selected + reminder time. PWA notifications need a browser/OS permission - accept the initial prompt. If you refused, reset it from your phone settings.

danger.title: Logout and delete
danger.logoutBody: Sign out on this device. Your data stays.
danger.resetBody: Erase local training data on this device. Cloud backup unchanged.
danger.deleteBody: Permanently delete your account and all data. This can't be undone.
danger.warningBanner: The actions below affect your account. Read the confirmation page carefully before running them.
danger.logoutRowSub: Your data stays on the phone.
danger.resetRowSub: Erase everything on this phone. Account kept.
danger.gdprFooter: GDPR Art. 17: on "Delete account," local data + the Firebase RTDB backup are erased automatically (best-effort, server propagation <5 min).

confirms.logoutBody: You'll need to sign in again.
confirms.deleteBody: All your data will be permanently deleted. Type DELETE to confirm.
confirms.resetBody: Local training data will be erased on this device.
confirms.resetCoachBody: The AI will restart learning from scratch.
confirms.redoOnboardingBody: You'll go through the initial setup again.

logout.title: Sign out
logout.heading: Sign out?
logout.body1: Your account and logged workouts (including records) stay safely saved and come back when you sign in with the same email.
logout.body2: For your safety on a shared device, the displayed history, the weight chart, and your streak are cleared from this phone on sign-out.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.heading: Heads up
deleteAccount.body1: All your data (local + remote) will be erased immediately.
deleteAccount.body2: This action cannot be undone. You won't be able to recover the data after confirming.

resetData.title: Reset data
resetData.heading: Reset all data?
resetData.body1: All workouts, ratings, and local measurements will be erased.
resetData.body2: Your account stays active. This action cannot be undone.

redoOnboarding.title: Redo onboarding
redoOnboarding.heading: Heads up
redoOnboarding.body1: You'll redo the initial setup - goals, experience level, availability.
redoOnboarding.body2: Your current profile is kept, but old answers will be overwritten. Reversible if you finish onboarding again.

resetCoach.title: Reset coach
resetCoach.heading: Heads up
resetCoach.body1: This will erase the AI progress learned about you and restart the coach from scratch.
resetCoach.body2: Your training data stays intact. Irreversible.

schimbaFaza.title: Switch phase manually
schimbaFaza.heading: Heads up
schimbaFaza.body1: Switching the active phase manually? This will reset some calibrations. Continue?
schimbaFaza.body2: The coach will recalibrate TDEE, volume, and progression based on the new phase. Historical data stays intact.

options.autoHintWithNow: Coach decides based on progress - now: {label} (recommended)

finishEarly.title: Finish early
finishEarly.heading: Finish the session now?
finishEarly.body1: The partial session is saved. The coach uses what you've logged so far - you don't lose progress.
finishEarly.body2: The recorded sets stay in the history. The coach adjusts the week based on what you did.

programChange.title: Change program
programChange.heading: Change program?
programChange.body1Prefix: The coach will regenerate the week as
programChange.body2: Completed sessions stay in the history.

insufficient.label: Not enough data
insufficient.detail: Log 2+ sessions to see your fatigue score

HIGH_FATIGUE.label: We'll go lighter today
HIGH_FATIGUE.detail: There've been a few heavy sessions recently. Volume is set more conservatively for a full recovery.

MODERATE_FATIGUE.label: A bit more conservative
MODERATE_FATIGUE.detail: Today we hold the weights and focus on technique and control.

PEAK_FORM.label: We're in good shape
PEAK_FORM.detail: Recovery is complete. We've got the energy to push the bar today.

NORMAL.label: On track
NORMAL.detail: Healthy rhythm. Let's go with today's plan.

preset: Let's go, you've got the rhythm.
Same tempo as last time - you're locked in.
This set is going well - one deep breath before you start.
Hold the form, the rest follows.
postUsor: Too easy - we'll add a touch on the next one.
If you have more in the tank, push 1-2 extra reps on the next set.
Nice - the coach raises the bar a bit.
postPotrivit: That's what we want - you're right on track.
Good, you're moving well. Same approach.
Just right - solid prediction. Keep it up.
postGreu: OK, we'll pull back a notch on the next one.
Hard set - we hold the same weight, no pushing.
Noted. The coach adjusts on its own.
rest: Sip some water, drop the shoulders.
That set was solid - same effort on the next.
transition: Nice - first one in the bag.
That's it. One more exercise and you're halfway.
endSessionUsor: Moving well - see you Thursday with more pep.
Clean session. Tomorrow we go up a notch.
endSessionGreu: Moving well - it was a hard one today, tomorrow we recover.
Noted. You gave it all - that's what matters.
reflectie: Today's session moved you closer to your monthly target - keep going.
12 days in a row. Consistency beats intensity.
Good rhythm. Tomorrow rest, Thursday we come back.
preview: We know what's on for today - let's do it clean.
Listen to your body; we'll adjust on the fly if anything comes up.

auth.title: Welcome
auth.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a sign-in link.
auth.sentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Tap it to continue.
auth.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.errorGeneric: Couldn't send the link. Please try again.

offline.banner: You're offline. Some features won't work until you're back online.

install.prompt: Install Andura for the full experience.
